body: Permits have been filed for a 13-story residential building at 201 East 198th Street in Bedford Park, The Bronx.
The New York City LPC is set to review a proposal for a new mixed-use building from OPerA Studio at 122-124 Greenpoint Avenue in Greenpoint, Brooklyn.

developer: CPA Architecture and Parents With A Plan
body: Work is underway on Thrive, a three-story, 32-unit project from CPA Architecture and Parents With A Plan at 273 Shrewsbury Avenue in Red Bank, New Jersey.

developer: Morris Adjmi Architects and Skyline Developers
body: Work is finished on 18W55, a 25-story, 97-unit project from Morris Adjmi Architects and Skyline Developers at 18 West 55th Street in Midtown, Manhattan.
Permits have been filed for a 12-story residential building at 1917 Morris Avenue in Mount Hope, The Bronx.
A 20,000-square-foot municipal grocery store is planned for The Peninsula mixed-use development in Hunts Point, The Bronx.
YIMBY recently checked in on the progress of four low-rise residential and commercial projects near the 8th Avenue subway station in Sunset Park, Brooklyn.
Renderings have been revealed for the $150 million renovation of Barclays Center designed by Populous in Prospect Heights, Brooklyn.
Permits have been filed for a 14-story residential building at 122 Bruckner Boulevard in Mott Haven, The Bronx.

address: Park Towers HDFC at 644 Riverside Drive
body: The affordable housing lottery has launched for Park Towers HDFC, a 12-story residential building at 644 Riverside Drive in Hamilton Heights, Manhattan.
A rendering has been revealed for a 972-unit residential complex from IMC Architecture and Bawabeh Holdings in East Flatbush, Brooklyn.
New York YIMBY tracks construction and real estate in New York City from a pro-growth perspective.
New York YIMBY tracks construction and real estate in New York City from a pro-growth perspective.
Permits have been filed for a nine-story mixed-use building at 64 Meserole Street in Williamsburg, Brooklyn.

address: Clermont Area HDFC at 389 Clinton Avenue
body: The affordable housing lottery has launched for Clermont Area HDFC, a seven-story residential building at 389 Clinton Avenue in Clinton Hill, Brooklyn.

address: 31-33 West 110th Street, a 22-story affordable housing redevelopment
body: Developers have secured $97.8 million in financing for 31-33 West 110th Street, a 22-story affordable housing redevelopment in Harlem, Manhattan.
Exterior work is progressing on The Morgan, an 18-story, 137-unit project from INC Architecture & Design at 38 West 35th Street in Murray Hill, Manhattan.
Permits have been filed for a convenience store accessory to an automotive service station at 2281 Flatbush Avenue in Flatlands, Brooklyn.
The affordable housing lottery has launched for 477 Central Avenue, a four-story residential building in Bushwick, Brooklyn.

address: 351 Powers Avenue, an eight-story residential building
body: The City Council has approved the city’s first ELURP application for 351 Powers Avenue, an eight-story residential building in Mott Haven, The Bronx.
Renderings reveal the 13-story redesign for Utopia Living at 71-12 Park Avenue from DSM Design Group and Marx Development Center in Kew Gardens Hills.
Permits have been filed for an 11-story mixed-use building at 1070 Pacific Street in Crown Heights, Brooklyn.
The affordable housing lottery has launched for Peninsula 1221 and 1225 Spofford Avenue, a 14-story residential building in Hunts Point, The Bronx.
Orchard Beach Pavilion has reopened at Orchard Beach in The Bronx's Pelham Bay Park following a $114 million reconstruction project designed by Marvel.
Construction is complete on Rockaway Village, an eight-building, 1,700-unit affordable housing development from Marvel and Phipps in Far Rockaway, Queens.
